answer: 每个配置项默认值与取值范围

task.diff:
config.yaml:
- port: int, default 8080, range 1-65535, env APP_PORT, hot-reload: no
- log_level: enum[debug,info,warn,error], default info, env APP_LOG_LEVEL, hot-reload: yes
- workers: int, default 4, range 1-64, env APP_WORKERS, hot-reload: no
- cache_ttl_s: int, default 300, env APP_CACHE_TTL, hot-reload: yes
